response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with clear exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest — aligning well with the core stack and responsibilities. His open-source contributions, architecture versatility, and DevOps fluency (Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI) are significant strengths. Concerns include limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Kotlin/Java in professional contexts, and German language limitation for a Berlin-based role, though English fluency offsets this.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS CDK
Strong AI-agent and developer tooling experience including MCP frameworks
Active open-source contributor with DevOps and containerization skills (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js in professional work history
Kotlin/Java experience limited to past embedded/robotics roles, not enterprise backend
Basic German proficiency may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
